system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_tonghop_phieuxuat_donhang_print2","body":"CREATE PROC [dbo].[TR_TONGHOP_PHIEUXUAT_DONHANG_PRINT2](@donhang nvarchar(max))
AS
BEGIN
	DECLARE @TONGHOP TABLE
	(
		mucdich nvarchar(200),
		maloaiphieu int,
		tenkho nvarchar(200),
		mact nvarchar(200),
		tenct nvarchar(max),
		quycach nvarchar(200),
		mausac nvarchar(200),
		dvt nvarchar(50),
		soluong float,
		makho nvarchar(50),
		donhangsanxuat nvarchar(200)
	)

	INSERT INTO @TONGHOP (mucdich, maloaiphieu, tenkho, mact, tenct, quycach, mausac, dvt, soluong, makho, donhangsanxuat)
	SELECT C.RefTypeName as loaiphieu, A.RefType,
		D.[description] AS tenkho,
		B.mavt, E.mota, E.quycach, E.mausac, E.dvt,
		soluong = -SUM(B.slnhap + B.soluong_du),
		A.makho, A.donhangsanxuat
	FROM tr_phieunhap A
		INNER JOIN tr_ctphieunhap B ON A.sopn = B.sopn
		INNER JOIN tr_reftype C ON A.RefType = C.RefType
		INNER JOIN tr_material E ON B.mavt = E.mavt
		LEFT JOIN tr_site D ON A.makho = D.[name]
	WHERE A.active = 1 AND A.RefType IN (2012)
		AND A.donhangsanxuat IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM([value])) FROM dbo.fn_Split(@donhang, ','))
	GROUP BY C.RefTypeName, A.RefType, D.[description], B.mavt, E.mota, E.quycach, E.mausac, E.dvt, A.makho, a.donhangsanxuat


	SELECT A.makho, A.RefType, A.mucdich,
		B.mact, C.mota, C.quycach, C.mausac, C.dvt, B.soluong, A.donhang AS donhangsanxuat
	INTO #PHIEUXUATKHO
	FROM tr_phieuxuat A
		INNER JOIN tr_ctphieuxuat B ON A.sopx = B.phieuxuat
		INNER JOIN tr_material C ON B.mact = C.mavt
	WHERE A.IsXuat = 1 AND A.active = 1
		AND A.donhang IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM([value])) FROM dbo.fn_Split(@donhang, ','))

	INSERT INTO @TONGHOP (mucdich, maloaiphieu, tenkho, mact, tenct, quycach, mausac, dvt, soluong, makho, donhangsanxuat)
	SELECT C.RefTypeName, C.RefType, D.[description] AS tenkho, A.mact, A.mota, A.quycach, A.mausac, A.dvt,
		SUM(A.soluong) AS soluong,
		A.makho, A.donhangsanxuat
	FROM #PHIEUXUATKHO A
		LEFT JOIN tr_reftype B ON A.RefType = B.RefType
		LEFT JOIN tr_reftype C ON A.mucdich = C.RefType
		LEFT JOIN tr_site D ON A.makho = D.[name]
	GROUP BY C.RefTypeName, C.RefType, D.[description], A.mact, A.mota, A.quycach, A.mausac, A.dvt, A.makho, A.donhangsanxuat

	DROP TABLE #PHIEUXUATKHO

	SELECT A.*, B.dongia, B.loaitien, thanhtien = A.soluong * B.dongia
	FROM @TONGHOP A
		INNER JOIN tr_material B ON A.mact = B.mavt

END","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.fn_split","dbo.tr_ctphieunhap","dbo.tr_ctphieuxuat","dbo.tr_material","dbo.tr_phieunhap","dbo.tr_phieuxuat","dbo.tr_reftype","dbo.tr_site"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
